CustomField.description: Sum of all Supplemental Rent History records for entire lease. Used for Supplemental Rent History verification against MR calculated on Supplemental Rent
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sum of all Supplemental Rent History records for entire lease. Used for Supplemental Rent History verification against MR calculated on Supplemental Rent
CustomField.label: Z_Unused 2106 Supplmntl Rnt Hstry Ttal
